productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Green Casual Shoes
description: These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and aggressive design highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek referenced sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a tee. Throw on a tonal jacket for added style. This pair comes with a spare set of laces. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and style Stitched nubuck overlays for midfoot support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Printed branding on tongue for style Perforations on the tongue Midsole Foam midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Outsole Durable TPU outsole with terraced grooves and circular lugs with an upraised heel shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
